animations.name: Impatient Tap
animations.description: Quick bouncy tap expressing impatience

animations.name: Scan Left-Right
animations.description: Eyes slide left then right repeatedly while waiting

animations.name: Bored Sigh
animations.description: Body deflates slowly with a sigh, ears droop, then reluctantly reinflates

animations.name: Fidget Sway
animations.description: Restless side-to-side body sway of suppressed frustration

animations.name: Eye Roll
animations.description: Eyes drift upward with a subtle eye-roll of frustration
